title: Spicy Creamy French Trout Dumplings
description: A comforting French dish featuring trout and dumplings in a spicy, creamy sauce, adapted to be vegan-friendly.
instructions: In a large pot, sauté the onion, carrot, and celery in vegan butter until softened.
Add the vegetable broth, thyme, paprika, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
While the broth is simmering, prepare the dumpling dough. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour and a pinch of salt. Gradually add the non-dairy milk, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth. Divide into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
When the broth has finished simmering, carefully add the trout fillets (or substitute) to the pot.
Place a dumpling on top of each trout fillet.
Cover the pot and cook for an additional 8-10 minutes, or until the dumplings are cooked through and the trout is flaky.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the trout and dumplings from the pot. Place on a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Strain the cooking liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean saucepan, discarding the solids.
Add the vegan cream to the saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve the trout and dumplings with the spicy creamy sauce spooned over the top.
